method: Date-aware compose(): signals_as_of(date) applies every scheduled/in_force event in the event calendar with effective_date <= date, then re-runs the Atlas algorithm. Contingent events (a bill not yet enacted) are never applied by date — they are shown as hypothetical 'class_if_enacted' branches. Every event is a tier1_legal change in law backed by tier1_legal records (enforced); a market launch is never an event. NOT asserted authoritative.

event_provenance.discipline: the time engine advances only on tier1_legal events backed by tier1_legal records

headline: The directed edge US->UK is Category III/T while the UK regime is in transition and becomes Category I (dual authorization) once the systemic regime is operative (modelled 2027). The regime-in-transition caveat on UK undirected pairs (I/II*) resolves at the same horizon. The EU-UK and UK-US undirected pairs remain findings AFTER that horizon because their residual is STRUCTURAL — the Atlas scores live-live as I/II (dual-authorization-or-partnership) while Architecture §5.14 authored them as cleanly bridgeable I — not temporal. The time engine thus separates a regime-in-transition artifact (resolves by date) from a genuine modelling difference (does not).

events.title: UK systemic stablecoin regime + FCA conduct regime operative (SI 2026/102 full commencement)
events.basis: FSMA 2026 framework via SI 2026/102: made 4 Feb 2026; the BoE systemic-stablecoin regime and FCA conduct regime become operative on full commencement 25 Oct 2027.
events.date_basis: Gazetted commencement DAY: SI 2026/102 (FSMA 2000 (Cryptoassets) Regulations 2026) made 4 Feb 2026, full commencement 25 Oct 2027 (preparatory provisions from 25 Feb 2026). precision=day — a specific commencement date, not a modelled year.
events.source_note: effective_date corrected 2027-01-01 (modelled year) -> 2027-10-25 (gazetted commencement day) per the v0.9.5 external verification of SI 2026/102.

events.title: Taiwan Virtual Asset Service Act enacted (issuer licensing regime live)
events.trigger: Enactment and commencement of the Virtual Asset Service Act (currently a bill at the Executive Yuan).
events.basis: Draft Virtual Asset Service Act (Executive Yuan referral); tw-frs-issuer_pathway-001 carries the draft provisions as status=proposed.
events.date_basis: No firm enactment date; inbound_gate target ('channel') is provisional pending the enacted text. The Legislative Yuan Finance Committee completed the article-by-article first review (初審) on 3 Jun 2026 and resolved to send the bill to the plenary (no caucus negotiation), but it has NOT passed third reading. Procedurally more advanced than KR's DABA (still in subcommittee).

events.title: Korea Digital Asset Basic Act enacted (won-stablecoin issuer regime live)
events.trigger: Enactment and commencement of the Digital Asset Basic Act (currently a bill).
events.basis: Draft Digital Asset Basic Act; kr-frs-issuer_pathway-001 carries the draft eligibility question as status=proposed.
events.date_basis: No firm enactment date. As of late Apr 2026 the Digital Asset Basic Act and three stablecoin-specific bills remained in the National Assembly Political Affairs Committee subcommittee (정무위 소위), with a full-committee session around mid-May 2026; an H2-2026 passage goal is described as uncertain, delayed by the won-stablecoin issuer-eligibility (51%) dispute (the Bank of Korea favouring a bank-majority consortium) and the June 2026 local elections / committee reconstitution. Procedurally less advanced than TW's VAS Act (already past committee first review).

events.title: Japan Act No. 66 of 2025 full enforcement (trust-type reserve relaxation)
events.basis: Act No. 66 of 2025 relaxing trust-type reserve rules; refines an already-live EPI regime.
events.date_basis: Full enforcement scheduled 13 Jun 2026 (Cabinet orders pending as of the base date). Effect on compose() is NONE — Japan is already 'live'; this refines reserve rules, not the inbound gate. Included to show the calendar distinguishes a change in law from a change in feasibility class.

events.title: US CLARITY Act enacted (digital-asset market structure; intermediary yield + routing layer live)
events.trigger: Enactment of the Digital Asset Market Clarity Act (H.R. 3633). On the Senate Legislative Calendar as Calendar No. 423 (reported 1 Jun 2026); still requires Senate floor passage, reconciliation with the Senate Agriculture and House versions, and Presidential signature.
events.basis: GENIUS is already in force (the issuer-level layer). CLARITY is the pending market-structure layer (H.R. 3633): us-pss-bank_nonbank_routing-001 binds on it, and the us-pss-permitted_activity_yield-001 / us-pss-securities_classification-001 / us-pss-issuer_pathway-001 cells carry its Sec. 404 and market-structure parts as flagged pending overlays.
events.date_basis: No firm enactment date. 2026 passage is roughly even (Polymarket near 48% in late Jun 2026, down from about 74% a month earlier); the practical window requires Senate floor passage before the August recess. Modelled as contingent until a date is fixed.

events.title: Singapore SCS framework implementing legislation enacted (MAS-regulated stablecoin regime live)
events.trigger: Enactment of the implementing legislation for the MAS Single-Currency Stablecoin (SCS) framework (finalised 15 Aug 2023). MAS announced at the Nov 2025 Singapore FinTech Festival that it was ready to begin drafting; the framework is expected to take effect in mid-2026.
events.basis: The PS Act 2019 DPT baseline is already in force. The SCS-specific framework is finalised MAS policy pending implementing legislation; the sg-scs-* requirement cells carry it as binding_status=finalized_policy_pending, status=transitional.
events.date_basis: No firm enactment date. MAS guidance points to a mid-2026 effective date; drafting was announced ready as of Nov 2025. Modelled as contingent until a date is fixed.
